title: Amtech G4200 Laminate Wood Flooring Installation Kit
features: Ideal for: Whether it’s for domestic or professional use, the Amtech laminate flooring kit is the ideal set for both occasions.
Used for: This laminate flooring tools can be used to strengthen the floor and for solid wood floor installation. With this kit, installing new laminate and hardwood flooring has never been easier.

Essentials: Everything you need to install your new laminate or hardwood flooring can be found in this kit. Comes with a rubber and hard plastic head mallet, a pull bar, a tapping block, and 20 wedges.
Suitable for: This kit is suitable for light use with 7mm - 15mm laminate or hardwood flooring.
description: From the manufacturer About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
